untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition for 'Broadening Pattern formation' and 'volume shape confirmation (dome-shaped or U-shaped)' which cannot be expressed as simple indicator comparisons. The pattern structure itself and volume shape analysis require custom pattern detection logic not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Translated volume trend condition (low volume before breakout) as volume < sma_20. Used Donchian channels to approximate broadening pattern boundaries and breakout detection. CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction preserved by providing both entry_long and entry_short conditions. Exit conditions set as reversal of entry breakouts per AUTHOR_SILENT rule. Market regime filtering (BULL_MARKET/BEAR_MARKET) mapped to TRENDING_UP/TRENDING_DOWN.
